overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny urban commercial district in Los Santos. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, and passes by various storefronts including a Jack in the Box and Supreme store, with palm trees and modern skyscrapers visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and modern towers

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and crosses the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street at a crosswalk with red brick pattern

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall curved building with dark glass facade and horizontal white lines
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk with thick trunks
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner
zebra crossing with distinctive red brick pattern

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunny urban sidewalk with a modern curved glass tower visible to the left. The character walks forward past palm trees and approaches a crosswalk. At around 6 seconds, the character crosses the street, with a white SUV visible driving on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with fast food restaurant and pedestrians

events.description: approaching the Jack in the Box restaurant area with red signage
turning slightly right toward the restaurant entrance and parking lot

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing groups of pedestrians and approaching the Jack in the Box restaurant

group of people standing and conversing outside a storefront

entered.detail: red fast food restaurant building with outdoor seating area and branded signage
golden muscle car parked in the restaurant parking lot

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a commercial sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic. The Jack in the Box restaurant becomes visible on the left with its distinctive red exterior. The character passes by pedestrians walking in the opposite direction and approaches the restaurant's outdoor seating area and parking lot where a gold sports car is parked.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with billboards and parking lots

events.description: exiting the restaurant parking lot onto the main commercial street
waiting for a blue SUV to pass before continuing along the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot and along the street past various commercial buildings and billboards

notable_agents.action: blue SUV driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall billboard structure advertising a white SUV vehicle
beige commercial building with Dynasty 8 signage and stone facade
row of low-rise commercial storefronts with various business signs

segments.scene_description: The character exits the Jack in the Box parking lot and walks along a wider commercial street. Large billboards become visible in the distance, including one advertising a white SUV. The character passes the Dynasty 8 building and continues along the asphalt surface as vehicles drive by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with high-end retail stores and palm trees

events.description: entering the open plaza area with the Supreme store visible on the left
turning right to walk through the plaza toward the multi-story parking structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area, passing by the Supreme store and other retail establishments with palm trees in the center

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a low concrete wall near the palm trees

entered.detail: retail store with large red Supreme branding and red awnings on the facade
tall pink parking structure with multiple open levels and retail on the ground floor
cluster of palm trees in the center of the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open plaza area featuring the Supreme store with its distinctive red branding on the left. The plaza is paved with stone tiles and features a cluster of palm trees in the center. To the right, a tall pink multi-story parking structure dominates the view. The character turns right and walks through this open commercial space.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parking structure and highway access

events.description: crossing the street near the parking structure as vehicles pass by
turning left to follow the sidewalk alongside the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the sidewalk next to the multi-story parking structure with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: pink delivery truck with advertisement driving along the street
orange sports car driving past on the road

entered.detail: blue directional highway sign indicating freeway access
modern glass office tower with reflective windows in the downtown distance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street near the pink parking structure, navigating around moderate traffic including a pink delivery truck and an orange sports car. After crossing, the character turns left and walks along the sidewalk. A blue highway sign becomes visible, and in the distance, a tall glass skyscraper marks the downtown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with grassy median and mature trees

events.description: entering the shaded tree-lined section of the sidewalk with mature trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded sidewalk with mature trees providing cover on the left side

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large leafy deciduous trees providing shade over the sidewalk
strip of green grass between the sidewalk and the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a tree-lined sidewalk with mature deciduous trees providing partial shade. A grassy median separates the sidewalk from the road. The character follows a pedestrian in a blue shirt walking ahead, with the urban environment continuing into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban commercial district that transitions from a modern glass-tower corridor into a bustling plaza and finally toward the downtown skyline. It begins on a sidewalk beside a curved glass tower, moving past palm trees and across a street with passing traffic. As the character continues, the scene shifts toward a commercial strip featuring a red Jack in the Box restaurant and its parking lot before expanding into a wider street lined with large billboards and the Dynasty 8 building. The camera then enters an open stone plaza dominated by a red Supreme store and a tall pink parking structure, navigating through moderate traffic including a pink delivery truck and an orange sports car. Finally, the environment opens up toward a distant glass skyscraper and a blue highway sign, ending as the character follows a pedestrian along a tree-lined sidewalk with a grassy median.
